pi_items.source: Task description line 5: 'payment of 3,250.00 Euros'; Verifier line 34 loads from metadata; Setup creates payment record with this amount expected
Task description line 5: 'supplier \'Coopérative Agricole du Centre\''; Setup_task.sh line 22 creates Entity with this name; Verifier line 35 expects this payee
Task description line 5: 'on June 15, 2024'; Verifier line 36 expects this date in 'to_bank_at' field; Export_result.sh queries for date matching
Verifier line 69: uses tolerance in amount comparison 'abs(actual_amount - expected_amount) <= tolerance'; Standard practice for floating-point currency (1 cent EUR)
Setup_task.sh lines 20-33: supplier created via Entity.create!() within Rails runner if not found in database; No external data import

privileged_info_summary: The task requires recording an outgoing payment of 3,250.00 EUR to the supplier 'Coopérative Agricole du Centre' on 2024-06-15 in the Ekylibre farm management system. All metadata values are internally consistent with the task description and verifier logic. The supplier is synthetic data created programmatically during task setup. The amount tolerance is 0.01 EUR (standard 1-cent precision). The task uses database queries to verify the payment record was created with correct amount, payee name, and date.
